title: 1st Gen - Natural
description: generation: 1; subtype: 天然发酵; year_range: 1979-1989; key_features: 真菌发酵产物，中等降脂强度，代谢经CYP3A4

title: 2nd Gen - Synthetic
description: generation: 2; subtype: 全合成; year_range: 1993; key_features: 首个全合成他汀，中等强度，代谢经CYP2C9

title: 3rd Gen - High-Potency
description: generation: 3; subtype: 高降脂强度合成; year_range: 1997-至今; key_features: 合成他汀，高降脂效果（>40% LDL-C），长效半衰期

title: Lovastatin Acid
description: chinese: 洛伐他汀酸; role: 核心中间体; formula: C24H38O6; mw: 422.56; smiles: CC[C@H](C)C(=O)O[C@H]1[C@@H](C[C@@H]2C[C@@H](O)CC(=O)O2)C=CC=C[C@@H](C)C[C@H](C)C1; desc: 洛伐他汀内酯开环产物，活性形式; synthesis_from: Aspergillus terreus 发酵产物

title: Monacolin J
description: chinese: 莫那可林 J; role: 辛伐他汀关键中间体; formula: C19H30O4; mw: 322.44; desc: 洛伐他汀水解脱2-甲基丁酰侧链产物，辛伐他汀合成关键前体; synthesis_from: Lovastatin → hydrolysis → Monacolin J

title: Mevastatin Acid
description: chinese: 美伐他汀酸; role: 普伐他汀关键中间体; formula: C23H36O6; mw: 408.53; desc: 美伐他汀（Compactin）内酯开环产物，经微生物羟化得普伐他汀; synthesis_from: Penicillium citrinum 发酵产物

title: ATS-8 / DKT
description: chinese: 阿托伐他汀酮酯中间体; full_name: tert-Butyl (4R,6R)-6-(2-aminoethyl)-2,2-dimethyl-1,3-dioxane-4-acetate; role: 阿托伐他汀侧链中间体; formula: C14H27NO4; mw: 273.37; desc: 阿托伐他汀手性侧链关键砌块，Paal-Knorr缩合→内酰胺化

title: Rosuvastatin Pyrimidine Core
description: chinese: 瑞舒伐他汀嘧啶母核; full_name: 4-(4-Fluorophenyl)-6-isopropyl-2-(N-methylmethylsulfonamido)pyrimidine-5-carbaldehyde; role: 瑞舒伐他汀嘧啶母核中间体; formula: C17H20FN3O3S; mw: 365.42; desc: 瑞舒伐他汀嘧啶醛核心，经Wittig烯烃化→侧链偶联

title: Pitavastatin Quinoline Core
description: chinese: 匹伐他汀喹啉母核; role: 匹伐他汀喹啉母核中间体; desc: 4-对氟苯基喹啉母核，经Wittig-Horner与手性侧链偶联

title: Dicyclohexylamine Salt
description: chinese: 二环己胺盐; role: 普伐他汀结晶助剂; desc: 普伐他汀钠盐制备中的结晶纯化试剂

title: 2,2-Dimethylbutyryl Chloride
description: chinese: 2,2-二甲基丁酰氯; role: 侧链酰化试剂; used_in: ['Simvastatin']; desc: 与Monacolin J C8位羟基酰化引入辛伐他汀侧链

title: Diketone Intermediate (DKT)
description: chinese: 二酮中间体; role: Paal-Knorr合成砌块; used_in: ['Atorvastatin']; desc: 1,4-二酮与苄胺缩合→Paal-Knorr吡咯环合成

title: Wittig Phosphonium Ylide
description: chinese: Wittig磷叶立德试剂; role: 侧链引入试剂; used_in: ['Rosuvastatin', 'Pitavastatin']; desc: 用于嘧啶/喹啉醛→α,β-不饱和酯的Wittig烯烃化

title: Mevastatin
description: chinese: 美伐他汀; year: 1979; cas: 73573-88-3; formula: C23H34O5; mw: 390.51; cid: 64715; smiles: CC[C@H](C)C(=O)O[C@H]1[C@@H](C[C@@H]2C[C@@H](O)CC(=O)O2)C=CC=C[C@@H](C)C[C@H](C)C1; desc: 第一个发现的他汀(Compactin)，未商业化但为后续奠定基础; source: Penicillium citrinum发酵

title: Lovastatin
description: chinese: 洛伐他汀; year: 1987; cas: 75330-75-5; formula: C24H36O5; mw: 404.54; cid: 53232; smiles: CC[C@H](C)C(=O)O[C@H]1[C@@H](C[C@@H]2C[C@@H](O)CC(=O)O2)C=CC=C[C@@H](C)C[C@H](C)C1; desc: 首个FDA批准的他汀，商品名Mevacor，曲霉发酵生产; source: Aspergillus terreus发酵

title: Pravastatin
description: chinese: 普伐他汀; year: 1989; cas: 81093-37-0; formula: C23H36O7; mw: 424.53; cid: 54687; desc: 美伐他汀经微生物羟化产物，水溶性好，不依赖CYP代谢; source: Mevastatin → 微生物羟化转化

title: Simvastatin
description: chinese: 辛伐他汀; year: 1988; cas: 79902-63-9; formula: C25H38O5; mw: 418.57; cid: 54454; smiles: CCC(C)(C)C(=O)O[C@H]1[C@@H](C[C@@H]2C[C@@H](O)CC(=O)O2)C=CC=C[C@@H](C)C[C@H](C)C1; desc: 洛伐他汀半合成衍生物（Monacolin J + DMBA 酰化），活性增强2-3倍; source: Lovastatin → Monacolin J → DMBA酰化

title: Fluvastatin
description: chinese: 氟伐他汀; year: 1993; cas: 93957-54-1; formula: C24H26FNO4; mw: 411.47; cid: 446155; desc: 首个全合成他汀，吲哚母核，CYP2C9代谢（DDI较少）; source: 吲哚母核全合成 + 侧链引入

title: Atorvastatin
description: chinese: 阿托伐他汀; year: 1997; cas: 134523-00-5; formula: C33H35FN2O5; mw: 558.64; cid: 60823; smiles: CC(C)C1=C(C(=C(C2=CC=C(C=C2)F)C3=CC=CC=C3)N1CC[C@@H](O)C[C@@H](O)CC(=O)O)C(=O)NC4=CC=CC=C4; desc: 史上最畅销药物(Lipitor)，吡咯母核，CYP3A4代谢，LDL-C降幅>40%; source: Paal-Knorr吡咯合成 + ATS-8侧链偶联

title: Rosuvastatin
description: chinese: 瑞舒伐他汀; year: 2003; cas: 287714-41-4; formula: C22H28FN3O6S; mw: 481.54; cid: 446157; smiles: CC(C)C1=NC(=C(C=N1)C=CC(CC(CC(=O)O)O)O)C2=CC=C(C=C2)F; desc: 最强降脂他汀(Crestor)，嘧啶母核+甲磺酰胺基，LDL-C降幅>50%; source: 嘧啶醛核心 + Wittig烯烃化 + 手性还原

title: Pitavastatin
description: chinese: 匹伐他汀; year: 2003; cas: 147511-69-1; formula: C25H24FNO4; mw: 421.46; cid: 5282452; desc: 喹啉母核，CYP代谢少，药物相互作用风险低; source: 喹啉醛核心 + Wittig-Horner + 手性还原
